parameters: Wanting to wash away a day's worth of grime, I got into the bathtub.
This place might just be my favourite place in the house.
It's actually routine for me to take long baths.
There's many reasons for that, but one big one is that
I don't run into my old man here.
After that argument the other day, things were even more strained
Of course, I'm the one in the wrong for not maturing up.
I know that in my head, but I couldn't bring myself to apologize,
so I was just ignoring things instead.
I really do gotta apologize this time though.
I wonder how much those words, that I blurted out in a fit of anger,
Damn, if I stay in any longer I'm gonna catch a fever.
Looking at the phone that I'd brought in with me, I realized that nearly
a whole hour had passed with me in the bath.
Guess I'll go to the balcony to cool off.
With slightly unsteady steps, I left the bath.
Would you like to view [Shino's viewpoint]?
(You can view it at any time from the Room of Recollections.)
This is my old man's room.
...You're helping us out a lot... so you really don't...
